news.title:
Zee board redeems FCCBs worth $23.9M, cancels $215.1M unutilized commitment.
Plans Rs. 500Cr investment in OCPDs, Rs. 20.09Cr in CORE to raise stake to 50%.
news.summary:
Zee board redeems FCCBs worth $23.9M, cancels $215.1M unutilized commitment.
Plans Rs. 500Cr investment in OCPDs, Rs. 20.09Cr in CORE to raise stake to 50%.

news.title:
Norges Bank sold a 0.6% stake in Zee Entertainment for ₹44.4 crore, indicating portfolio adjustments.
Zee's Q3 profit fell 5% to ₹154.8 crore due to weak ad revenue; stock closed at ₹71.25, down 1.5%.
news.summary:
Norges Bank sold a 0.6% stake in Zee Entertainment for ₹44.4 crore, indicating portfolio adjustments.
Zee's Q3 profit fell 5% to ₹154.8 crore due to weak ad revenue; stock closed at ₹71.25, down 1.5%.

news.title:
Bata India, Whirlpool of India, and Zee Ent. dropped to Covid-era lows despite Nifty50's 250% surge.
These Nifty500 stocks face weak revenues and mixed analyst ratings amid broader market gains.
news.summary:
Bata India, Whirlpool of India, and Zee Ent. dropped to Covid-era lows despite Nifty50's 250% surge.
These Nifty500 stocks face weak revenues and mixed analyst ratings amid broader market gains.

news.title:
SEBI issued a show cause notice to Zee Entertainment over fund diversion and governance lapses linked to the stalled Sony merger.
Zee denies allegations, citing shareholder losses due to prolonged probe. Shares rose 10.6% in a month, now trading at ₹92.8.
news.summary:
SEBI issued a show cause notice to Zee Entertainment over fund diversion and governance lapses linked to the stalled Sony merger.
Zee denies allegations, citing shareholder losses due to prolonged probe. Shares rose 10.6% in a month, now trading at ₹92.8.

news.title:
InGovern flags governance issues at Zee Entertainment, urging a forensic audit and professional MD appointment.
InGovern highlights promoter's operational control despite a stagnant equity stake below 4%.
news.summary:
InGovern flags governance issues at Zee Entertainment, urging a forensic audit and professional MD appointment.
InGovern highlights promoter's operational control despite a stagnant equity stake below 4%.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment plans further manpower cost cuts after reducing 951 employees from FY23 to FY25.
The move addresses challenges like shrinking pay TV subscribers and declining ad revenue.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment plans further manpower cost cuts after reducing 951 employees from FY23 to FY25.
The move addresses challenges like shrinking pay TV subscribers and declining ad revenue.

news.title: Citi retains 'Sell' rating on Zee Entertainment, cuts target price to Rs 80.
news.summary: Citi retains 'Sell' rating on Zee Entertainment, cuts target price to Rs 80.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment defers FCCB drawdowns until clarity on proceeds' deployment.
The company prioritizes visibility on utilization before proceeding with FCCB plans.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment defers FCCB drawdowns until clarity on proceeds' deployment.
The company prioritizes visibility on utilization before proceeding with FCCB plans.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment focuses on revenue growth via digital business and strategy.
It plans to leverage a favorable advertising environment for expansion.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment focuses on revenue growth via digital business and strategy.
It plans to leverage a favorable advertising environment for expansion.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment's Zee5 remains its fastest-growing vertical per guidance.
Management aims for better returns and positive unit economics medium-term.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment's Zee5 remains its fastest-growing vertical per guidance.
Management aims for better returns and positive unit economics medium-term.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment's Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹2.56B from ₹3.2B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 11.2% from 16.2% in the same period last year.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment's Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹2.56B from ₹3.2B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 11.2% from 16.2% in the same period last year.

news.title:
Zee Ent's Q3 profit drops 5% YoY to Rs 164 cr; revenue up 15%.
Mphasis, APL Apollo, Radico Khaitan, and IndiGo expected to report mixed Q3 results.
news.summary:
Zee Ent's Q3 profit drops 5% YoY to Rs 164 cr; revenue up 15%.
Mphasis, APL Apollo, Radico Khaitan, and IndiGo expected to report mixed Q3 results.

news.title:

Institutions own 36% of Zee; key shareholders include LIC (4.5%) and Norges Bank (3.9%).

news.title:
50 TV channels, including JioStar and Zee, surrendered licences amid digital shift.
India's linear TV sector faces challenges as digital consumption grows and ad revenue drops.
news.summary:
50 TV channels, including JioStar and Zee, surrendered licences amid digital shift.
India's linear TV sector faces challenges as digital consumption grows and ad revenue drops.

news.title:
Nifty 50 closed January green only twice in a decade, avg return 0.3%. Nifty Midcap 100, Smallcap 100 showed similar volatility.
IT index led with 1.4% avg return in 7/10 Januaries. Stocks like RVNL, Indian Bank gained consistently; Zee Ent., GM Breweries lagged.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 closed January green only twice in a decade, avg return 0.3%. Nifty Midcap 100, Smallcap 100 showed similar volatility.
IT index led with 1.4% avg return in 7/10 Januaries. Stocks like RVNL, Indian Bank gained consistently; Zee Ent., GM Breweries lagged.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment faces tax demand notices totaling 1.2b rupees.
The adjudicating authority has upheld the tax demand against Zeel.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment faces tax demand notices totaling 1.2b rupees.
The adjudicating authority has upheld the tax demand against Zeel.

news.title:
Sensex and Nifty ended flat; rupee closed at a record low of 90.19. Top gainers: Wipro, TCS. Top losers: HUL, Nestle.
Major IPOs include Manipal Hospitals' ₹1B issue and Meesho's ₹5,421 crore issue. JSW Steel, NHPC, and Zee announced key updates.
news.summary:
Sensex and Nifty ended flat; rupee closed at a record low of 90.19. Top gainers: Wipro, TCS. Top losers: HUL, Nestle.
Major IPOs include Manipal Hospitals' ₹1B issue and Meesho's ₹5,421 crore issue. JSW Steel, NHPC, and Zee announced key updates.

news.title:
Zee Entertainment announces layoffs amid restructuring after Sony merger collapse.
Downsizing aligns with April 2024 rationalisation to streamline operations.
news.summary:
Zee Entertainment announces layoffs amid restructuring after Sony merger collapse.
Downsizing aligns with April 2024 rationalisation to streamline operations.

news.title:
India's TV ad volumes dropped 10% in first 9 months of 2025 YoY.
FMCG cuts contributed to the slowdown, TAM AdEx data reported by ET.
news.summary:

news.title:
Retail investors increased stakes in Sterling & Wilson, Tejas Networks, and Praj Industries despite sharp declines.
Retail ownership surged in Ola Electric, Zee Entertainment, Angel One, JK Lakshmi Cement, and IEX.
